Router directives reject generic targets: handlers, receivers, groups,
middleware (declared and referenced), hooks, and serve functions.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

//fabrik:http GET /generic
func Index[T any](w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

type Box[T any] struct{}

//fabrik:http GET /boxed
func (b *Box[T]) Get(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http:group /api
type Group[T any] struct{}

//fabrik:http:middleware
func Trace[T any](next http.Handler) http.Handler { return next }

//fabrik:http:notfound
func Missing[T any](w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http:handle /files
func Files[T any]() http.Handler { return nil }

//fabrik:http:server
func Serve[T any](h http.Handler) error { return nil }
-- want/diags --
error: web/web.go:5:1: handler Index cannot be generic (generated code cannot instantiate type parameters)
  help: declare a concrete handler
error: web/web.go:10:1: handler Get cannot be generic (generated code cannot instantiate type parameters)
  help: declare a concrete handler
error: web/web.go:13:1: //fabrik:http:group cannot be on a generic type (Group has type parameters)
  help: declare a concrete struct
error: web/web.go:16:1: middleware Trace cannot be generic (generated code cannot instantiate type parameters)
  help: declare a concrete middleware
error: web/web.go:19:1: handler Missing cannot be generic (generated code cannot instantiate type parameters)
  help: declare a concrete handler
error: web/web.go:22:1: handler Files cannot be generic (generated code cannot instantiate type parameters)
  help: declare a concrete handler
error: web/web.go:25:1: serve function Serve cannot be generic (generated code cannot instantiate type parameters)
  help: declare a concrete function
